name: Southwest Fried Rice with Ancho Chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked rice and pecans.
2. Add chopped vegetables (bell pepper, zucchini, corn) and eggs to the bowl. Mix well.
3. Heat cooking oil in a pan over medium heat.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the pan and scramble until just set.
5. Add the remaining vegetables and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with green onions and cilantro before serving.
